email_subject: Application for Internship in Customer Sales Advisor at Bosch
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Internship in Customer Sales Advisor at Robert Bosch NV/SA in Anderlecht. As a junior digital marketer with a background in logistics and customer-facing roles, I am excited about the opportunity to support your Customer Service team.

In my current role at Episto, I manage client relationships, coordinate with internal teams, and ensure timely delivery of projects—skills directly transferable to order follow-up and customer communication. My experience at Katoen Natie in warehouse and logistics has given me a solid understanding of supply chain processes, which aligns with your preference for a logistics background. I am fluent in English and Dutch (A2, currently improving), and I have strong MS Office skills, including Excel.

I am a team player, stress-resistant, and enjoy solving problems creatively. I would love to bring my organizational skills and positive attitude to Bosch.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Internship in Customer Sales Advisor at Robert Bosch NV/SA in Anderlecht. With a background in digital marketing, logistics, and customer-facing roles, I am confident I can contribute to your Customer Service team.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites and coordinate with internal teams to deliver projects on time. This role has honed my communication, problem-solving, and organizational skills—essential for advising customers and managing orders from A to Z. Additionally, my experience at Katoen Natie in warehouse and logistics provided me with firsthand knowledge of supply chain operations, making me comfortable with order follow-up and shipment tracking.

I am pursuing a degree in Applied Computer Science, which has strengthened my analytical abilities and proficiency with MS Office, especially Excel. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I have a working knowledge of Dutch (A2, actively improving). I am a team player, stress-resistant, and I approach challenges with creativity and a sense of humor.

Bosch’s reputation for innovation and quality inspires me, and I am eager to support your ongoing projects and customer meetings. I am available to start in July 2026 for a 6-month internship.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your needs.

Warm regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Logistics experience at Katoen Natie, providing understanding of supply chain and order processes
Strong MS Office skills, including Excel, for performance monitoring and presentations
Client-facing role at Episto, managing communication and project follow-up from A to Z
Team player with problem-solving ability and stress resistance
Fluent in English and Dutch (A2, in progress); French is a plus
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, and hands-on experience in logistics and customer-facing roles. At Episto, I manage client relationships, coordinate internal teams, and ensure timely project delivery. My background in warehouse and logistics at Katoen Natie gives me a solid understanding of supply chain processes. I am a team player, stress-resistant, and creative problem-solver, with strong communication skills in English and Dutch (A2, in progress). Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: client relationship management, order follow-up, phone and email communication, problem-solving
- MS Office: Excel (data analysis, reporting), PowerPoint (presentations), Word
- Logistics & supply chain: warehouse operations, inventory accuracy, shipment tracking
- SEO & digital: on-page SEO, content management, performance reporting
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client websites and coordinate with internal teams to deliver projects on time
- Write keyword-targeted blog content and track site performance with analytics tools
- Build and maintain WordPress sites, ensuring content accuracy and timely updates

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Gained understanding of order processing and shipment follow-up

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site with full site structure and social media integration
- Implemented structured data and technical SEO audits to improve search visibility

EDUCATION

REFERENCES
Available on request.
